% ======================================================================
%  Shared preamble — SHEO project report (compiled with tectonic/XeLaTeX)
%  Chapter authors: DO NOT edit this file or add \usepackage. Use only the
%  packages, colours, macros, and environments defined here.
% ======================================================================
\usepackage{fontspec}                 % XeLaTeX Unicode font handling
\setmonofont{DejaVu Sans Mono}[Scale=0.85]   % code font (full glyph coverage)

\usepackage[a4paper,margin=2.5cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\graphicspath{{figures/}}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{xltabular}   % page-breakable tabularx (for long requirement tables)
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{ragged2e}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\usepackage{float}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\setlist{nosep,leftmargin=1.4em}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{positioning,shapes.geometric,arrows.meta,fit,backgrounds,calc}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}
\usepackage{microtype}

% ---- Okabe–Ito-ish palette (matches the figures) ----
\definecolor{accent}{HTML}{0072B2}
\definecolor{accent2}{HTML}{D55E00}
\definecolor{green}{HTML}{009E73}
\definecolor{codebg}{HTML}{F6F6F6}
\definecolor{codekw}{HTML}{0072B2}
\definecolor{codecm}{HTML}{6E7781}
\definecolor{codestr}{HTML}{009E73}
\definecolor{rulehead}{HTML}{EAF2FA}

% ---- hyperref colours ----
\hypersetup{colorlinks=true,linkcolor=accent,citecolor=accent,urlcolor=accent2}

% ---- code listings ----
\lstdefinestyle{code}{
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
  backgroundcolor=\color{codebg},
  keywordstyle=\color{codekw}\bfseries,
  commentstyle=\color{codecm}\itshape,
  stringstyle=\color{codestr},
  numbers=left, numberstyle=\tiny\color{codecm}, numbersep=8pt,
  frame=single, framesep=5pt, rulecolor=\color{black!15},
  breaklines=true, breakatwhitespace=false, showstringspaces=false,
  tabsize=2, columns=fullflexible, keepspaces=true,
  literate={→}{$\rightarrow$}{1} {≤}{$\le$}{1} {≥}{$\ge$}{1}
           {×}{$\times$}{1} {−}{-}{1} {·}{$\cdot$}{1} {∈}{$\in$}{1}
           {Σ}{$\Sigma$}{1} {±}{$\pm$}{1},
}
\lstset{style=code}
\newcommand{\code}[1]{\lstinline[basicstyle=\ttfamily\normalsize]|#1|}

% ---- captions ----
\captionsetup{font=small,labelfont=bf,labelsep=period}
\captionsetup[sub]{font=footnotesize}

% ---- section spacing / headers ----
\titleformat{\chapter}[display]{\normalfont\huge\bfseries\color{accent}}
  {\chaptertitlename\ \thechapter}{14pt}{\Huge}
\titlespacing*{\chapter}{0pt}{-10pt}{24pt}
\pagestyle{fancy}\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\fancyhead[L]{\small\nouppercase{\leftmark}}
\fancyhead[R]{\small SHEO Project Report}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
\setlength{\headheight}{14pt}

% ---- float placement: let large figures take a page rather than overflow ----
\renewcommand{\topfraction}{0.92}
\renewcommand{\bottomfraction}{0.9}
\renewcommand{\textfraction}{0.06}
\renewcommand{\floatpagefraction}{0.7}
\setcounter{topnumber}{2}\setcounter{totalnumber}{3}
% ---- a tidy full-width figure helper: \fig{file}{caption}{label} ----
\newcommand{\fig}[3]{%
  \begin{figure}[htbp]\centering
    \includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.82\textheight,keepaspectratio]{#1}%
    \caption{#2}\label{#3}
  \end{figure}}
% ---- scaled figure helper: \figw{file}{width}{caption}{label} ----
\newcommand{\figw}[4]{%
  \begin{figure}[htbp]\centering
    \includegraphics[width=#2\linewidth,height=0.82\textheight,keepaspectratio]{#1}%
    \caption{#3}\label{#4}
  \end{figure}}

% ---- a left-ragged X column for tables ----
\newcolumntype{Y}{>{\RaggedRight\arraybackslash}X}
\newcolumntype{L}[1]{>{\RaggedRight\arraybackslash}p{#1}}

% ---- requirement / term tags ----
\newcommand{\req}[1]{\textsf{\textbf{#1}}}

% ---- allow line breaks inside long monospace identifiers (e.g. test_a_b_c) ----
\renewcommand{\_}{\textunderscore\allowbreak}
